$doc: Codex delivery map. hooks.json and config.toml are ownership-tracked merges so Leo hook registrations coexist with user hooks. SessionStart injects global/AGENTS.md as additionalContext without replacing the user's global instructions. Skills are shared through ~/.agents/skills.

links.note: private-runtime launcher for every Leo Python hook
Codex reads ~/.agents/skills natively; shared with OpenCode/Cursor
SessionStart injector — emits global/AGENTS.md as additionalContext (additive; the user's ~/.codex/AGENTS.md is untouched and still loads)

retiredLinks.note: REMOVED: the whole-file symlink clobbered the user's global instructions and Codex has no @import — replaced by the SessionStart injector hook. leos-doctor flags a leftover clone-symlink here.
